crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET MALWARE Arid Gopher Related User-Agent (aimxxhwpcc)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Arid Gopher Related User-Agent (aimxxhwpcc)"; flow:established,to_server; http.user_agent; content:"aimxxhwpcc"; bsize:10; fast_pattern; reference:md5,1f1969481fe9bca52d5c01e1a093c1b8; reference:url,www.deepinstinct.com/blog/arid-gopher-the-newest-micropsia-malware-variant; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2035556; rev:1; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2022_03_22, deployment Perimeter, malware_family AridViper, malware_family TA401, confidence High, signature_severity Major, updated_at 2022_03_22;)
